about.hero_desc: We are a premium multivendor e-commerce platform powered by Ubaka Tech, connecting independent local sellers with customers looking for exceptional products and services across Rwanda.
about.story_desc1: Kuri Macye was born from a simple mission: to empower local merchants and make online shopping convenient, reliable, and accessible to everyone. Launched as a flagship marketplace product of Ubaka Tech, it has grown into a vibrant ecosystem supporting diverse vendors and thousands of happy shoppers.
about.story_desc2: We believe in building a platform that fosters growth for independent sellers while delivering a seamless, secure, and delightful experience to buyers. By integrating modern digital storefronts and specialized service offerings, we bridge the gap between merchants and their audience.

values_list.innovation_desc: We continually refine our marketplace tools, payment systems, and delivery integrations to provide a seamless vendor and buyer experience.
values_list.quality_desc: We ensure high standards across our platform, from vetted merchant listings to reliable customer service.
values_list.partnership_desc: We work closely with vendors as partners to support their business growth and help them scale online.

about.cta_desc: Join thousands of buyers and sellers who trust Kuri Macye for their online commerce. Discover premium products or start selling today.

contact.hero_desc: We are here to help. Send us a message and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

faq.hero_desc: Everything you need to know about our products and services.
faq.still_desc: If you couldn't find the answer you're looking for, our friendly support team is here to help.

items.a: Standard delivery typically takes 3-5 business days within Rwanda. Please contact us for delivery to other locations.
We accept returns within 30 days of purchase. The item must be unused and in its original packaging. Please contact our support team to initiate a return.

items.q: How can I track my order?
items.a: Once your order is shipped, you will receive a tracking number via email. You can also use the 'Track Order' link in the footer to check your status.
Yes, we deliver to most countries worldwide. Delivery costs and times vary based on location.

items.q: How can I contact customer support?
items.a: You can reach our support team via email at ishfabzele2@gmail.com or by calling +250 789 079 978 during business hours.

items.q: How do I become a seller on Kuri Macye?
items.a: You can register as a seller by clicking 'Become a Seller' in the navigation menu. Our team will review your application and get back to you within 48 hours.
